_doc: Maps harness skills -> the external tools they need to RUN. Skills are markdown; their teeth are external CLIs/packages/credentials. Consumed by scripts/bootstrap/provision-tools.js during claude-env-bootstrap EXECUTE (Step 5c) and --update. PER-PROJECT, DEMAND-DRIVEN: only tools for THIS project's SELECTED skills get provisioned (user lock 2026-06-15). Source: 4 extraction agents over the Wave A/B skills' own SKILL.md install instructions.

tiers.auto: Defensive / test / eval / build tool. Auto-installed for selected skills. project-dev scope installs into the project (npm -D / cargo --dev); global scope installs the CLI. Degrades to a PRINTED command (never silent) when this platform has no automatable path (e.g. needs WSL2 / needs Docker / needs admin / no package manager).
tiers.credential: API key or service-account file. CANNOT be installed — reported as 'set env var X (obtain from Y)'. Never blocks.
tiers.roe: Offensive recon / authenticated-DAST / exploitation tool. NOT installed at bootstrap by default. Provisioned at ROE time (authorized pentest, after PENTEST-ROE.md). Auto-installed at bootstrap ONLY if config.provision_offensive_tools === true. The skills that use these are themselves Q-pentest manual-gated in catalog.json.
tiers.reference: Named by a planning-only skill but NEVER executed by it (security-pentest-exploitation-planning is Read-only). NEVER installed by provisioning; listed for documentation only.
tiers.manual: Cluster-side (k8s) / build-file plugin / heavy SDK / platform-locked. Not a dev-box install — reported with the exact command + reason, never auto-run.

policy._offensive_note: Installing a binary != permitting an attack. The settings.json deny-list (sqlmap/hydra/msfconsole/zap-full-scan/...) + the pentest ROE double-gate still govern whether a tool may RUN, regardless of install state. To auto-install roe-tier tools at bootstrap, set provision_offensive_tools=true in the project's .claude/bootstrap.config.json (default false = safe).

style-dictionary.note: Project-local devDependency; do not install globally.

terrazzo-cli.note: Alternative DTCG-native engine to Style Dictionary.

shadcn.note: Run via 'npx shadcn@latest' on demand; needs only Node/npm present — no install.

install.npm: npm install --save-dev @playwright/test && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium

playwright.note: Screenshot + axe evidence when a dev server is up; design-reviewer/a11y degrade to code-only if absent.

axe-core-cli.note: Automated a11y scan when dev server up.

axe-core-playwright.note: QA a11y main path — axe on real rendered DOM.

lhci-cli.note: Shared by qa-a11y + web-seo CI; needs Node >= 22.19 for Lighthouse 13.x.

unlighthouse.note: Site-wide tech-SEO crawl; needs Chrome/Chromium on PATH; use --chrome-flags='--headless --no-sandbox' on Windows CI.

lighthouse.note: Pulled by unlighthouse/lhci; pin lighthouse@12 for Node < 22.19.

promptfoo.note: AI red-team eval harness; provider must point at own/staging endpoint.

stryker-core.note: Mutation testing (JS/TS); add a framework runner plugin e.g. @stryker-mutator/jest-runner.

aso-npm.note: facundoolano/aso — ASO keyword scrape; network-sensitive, records status=skipped on failure (never AI-estimates).

semgrep.note: Deep taint SAST primary; also Docker: returntocorp/semgrep. Windows: pip or Docker.

atheris.note: Python fuzzing; native-ext mode needs clang.

pyrit.note: AI red-team multi-turn orchestration vs OWN/staging agent only; use a venv. Python >= 3.10.

schemathesis.note: Generative contract testing from OpenAPI/GraphQL; also Docker.

prowler.note: Read-only cloud posture (CSPM) for supply-chain A5; needs read-only cloud creds via env to actually run.

install.win: scoop install osv-scanner || winget install Google.osv-scanner
winget install --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements k6 || scoop install k6 || choco install k6 -y
install.linux: (curl -fsSL https://dl.k6.io/key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/k6-archive-keyring.gpg) && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/k6-archive-keyring.gpg] https://dl.k6.io/deb stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/k6.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y k6
echo 'download from https://github.com/Shopify/toxiproxy/releases or use docker ghcr.io/shopify/toxiproxy'

toxiproxy.note: Network fault injection (resilience); Docker mode also works on any platform.

install.win: echo 'download joern-cli from https://github.com/joernio/joern/releases (needs JVM 11+); run joern.bat'
install.mac: brew install joern || echo 'see joernio/joern releases'

joern.note: Deep dataflow SAST (optional; semgrep is the auto primary). Heavy JVM tool, no simple pkg manager — reported, not auto-run.

codeql.note: LICENSE: free for OSI-open-source ONLY; private repos need GitHub Advanced Security. Optional; reported not auto-installed.

install.win: echo 'needs WSL2 or a Linux container: clang++ -fsanitize=fuzzer,address,undefined'

libfuzzer.note: C/C++ coverage-guided fuzzing; on Windows requires WSL2/Linux container.

install.win: echo 'needs WSL2/Linux container: docker pull aflplusplus/aflplusplus'
echo 'WSL2 recommended: curl -fsSL https://get.maestro.mobile.dev | bash (Android only on Windows; iOS needs macOS)'

maestro.note: Mobile E2E (DORMANT — only when a mobile-app project is detected).

install.win: echo 'install via Android Studio SDK Manager (sdkmanager emulator + system-images); enable Hyper-V/HAXM'
install.mac: echo 'install via Android Studio SDK Manager'
install.linux: echo 'install via Android Studio SDK Manager'

android-emulator.note: Heavy SDK; reported not auto-installed. Android flows only.

install.win: echo 'macOS only — iOS flows not runnable on Windows'
echo 'needs Docker Desktop: docker pull gaiaadm/pumba'
install.mac: echo 'docker pull gaiaadm/pumba or download release'
install.linux: echo 'download from https://github.com/alexei-led/pumba/releases or docker pull gaiaadm/pumba'

pumba.note: Container chaos (resilience); Docker mode canonical, needs Docker.

install.win: echo 'Linux only — run inside a Linux Docker container'

stress-ng.note: Resource-pressure faults; not native on Windows.

install.win: echo 'add org.pitest:pitest-maven to pom.xml or id "info.solidsoft.pitest" to build.gradle'
install.mac: echo 'add pitest plugin to build file'
install.linux: echo 'add pitest plugin to build file'

pitest.note: JVM mutation testing; build-file plugin, not a CLI install.

install.win: choco install kyverno || echo 'download kyverno CLI from https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/releases'

kyverno-cli.note: k8s admission-policy authoring (A3, conditional-k8s); CLI can dry-run policies locally. Cluster enforcement is Helm-installed into your cluster, not the dev box.

install.win: echo 'cluster-side: helm install gatekeeper gatekeeper/gatekeeper -n gatekeeper-system --create-namespace'

opa-gatekeeper.note: Cluster component (A3); not a dev-box install.

install.win: echo 'cluster-side: kubectl apply -f SPO operator.yaml (needs cert-manager; Linux nodes only)'

security-profiles-operator.note: Cluster component (A3); Linux k8s nodes only.

install.win: echo 'cluster-side: helm install tetragon cilium/tetragon -n kube-system (Linux kernel >= 5.4)'

tetragon.note: Cluster eBPF runtime detection (A3); Linux nodes only; observe-default.

install.win: echo '[ROE-time] docker pull ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable (invoke ONLY via scripts/security/zap-authenticated.sh wrapper; raw zap-full-scan.py is deny-listed)'

zap.note: Authenticated DAST; ROE-gated. Installed at authorized-pentest time, not bootstrap (unless provision_offensive_tools=true).

nuclei.note: Templated vuln scan (recon + authenticated DAST); ROE-gated, wrapper-only (scripts/security/scan-nuclei.sh). ROE-time install.

amass.note: Subdomain enum (recon); ROE-gated, wrapper-only. Verify current major version at install. ROE-time install.

ffuf.note: Content discovery (recon); ROE-gated, wrapper-only. ROE-time install.

httpx-pd.note: ProjectDiscovery httpx prober (NOT python httpx). Part of the ROE recon bundle. ROE-time install.

metasploit.note: PLANNING REFERENCE ONLY (exploitation-planning is Read-only). NEVER bootstrap-installed; msfconsole/msfvenom are deny-listed in settings.json.

sliver.note: PLANNING REFERENCE ONLY (C2 framework). NEVER installed by provisioning.

caldera.note: PLANNING REFERENCE ONLY (adversary-sim taxonomy). NEVER installed.

pacu.note: PLANNING REFERENCE ONLY (AWS exploitation). NEVER installed by provisioning.

bloodhound.note: PLANNING REFERENCE ONLY (AD attack-path). NEVER installed.

scoutsuite.note: Read-only cloud posture planning reference (exploitation-planning). NEVER installed by provisioning; if you want CSPM use prowler (auto, supply-chain).

perplexity-api-key.note: ONLY provider returning real source URLs for true AI-citation determination (web-aeo §20).

openai-api-key.note: Parametric provider only — brand_mention_rate, NOT citation evidence.

gsc-credentials.obtain: Google Cloud Console OAuth2 service account; Search Console property must be verified (free API)

ga4-credentials.obtain: GA4 admin numeric property ID; same service account as GSC if Analytics scope added (free API)

bing-webmaster-api-key.obtain: Bing Webmaster Tools -> Settings -> API Access (free API)

asc-api-key.obtain: App Store Connect -> Users and Access -> Keys; .p8 downloaded once (non-recoverable)

gplay-service-account.obtain: Google Cloud Console service account with Play Console access; download JSON

install.win: echo 'git submodule add https://github.com/zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude.git tools/vendor/geo-seo-claude && git -C tools/vendor/geo-seo-claude checkout 5d8c0afe3b44bf9123f6849e97541f85eefabaca'

geo-seo-claude.note: web-aeo pre-launch audit vendor (commit-pinned); project-specific submodule, reported not auto-run.
